name: theToyBox
description: The Toy Box is a VS Code extension that bundles essential productivity tools: auto-cleanup on save, a smarter code outline for SQL/PHP/Web, custom comment highlighting, GitHub-style Markdown alerts, JSON formatting, equals alignment, and real-time HTML/XML tag renaming — all in one package.

commands.title: The Toy Box: Align with Tabs
The Toy Box: Fix Tabs and Trim
The Toy Box: Format JSON Selection
The Toy Box: Open Markdown Preview with Alerts
The Toy Box: Install JetBrainsMono Nerd Font

theToyBox.trimTrailingWhitespace.description: Trim trailing whitespace from lines during cleanup.

theToyBox.ignoreTrimWhitespace.description: List of file extensions to skip trailing whitespace trimming (e.g., .md, .txt).

theToyBox.convertSpacesToTabs.description: Convert leading spaces to tabs during cleanup.

theToyBox.ignoreTabConversion.description: List of file extensions to ignore when converting spaces to tabs (e.g., .yaml, .json).

theToyBox.customComments.enabled.description: Enable or disable custom comment highlighting.

theToyBox.customComments.showBackground.description: If enabled, comments will have a background highlight across the entire line.

theToyBox.customComments.fullLineHighlig.description: If enabled, highlighting covers the entire line.

theToyBox.customComments.colors.description: Map special characters to hex colors.

theToyBox.customComments.excludedFileTyp.description: List of file extensions to exclude from custom comment highlighting (e.g., .md, .txt).

theToyBox.customComments.labels.description: Map symbols to specific label words (e.g., ! -> CRITICAL).

theToyBox.indentRainbow.description: Display rainbow colors for indentation levels on file load and when editing.

theToyBox.indentRainbowOpacity.description: Opacity of the indent rainbow background colors, as a percentage (1–100).

theToyBox.indentRainbowColors.description: Custom color palette for indent rainbow levels (hex strings, e.g. "#FFB3B3"). Leave empty to use the built-in pastel palette.

theToyBox.markdownHeadings.enabled.description: Enable or disable heading highlighting in Markdown files.

theToyBox.markdownHeadings.showBackgroun.description: If enabled, headings will have a background color highlight.

theToyBox.markdownHeadings.fullLineHighl.description: If enabled, the background highlight covers the entire line.

theToyBox.markdownHeadings.colors.description: Map each heading level (h1–h6) to a hex color.

theToyBox.markdownPreview.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Markdown Preview with Alerts command.

theToyBox.wordFrequency.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Word Frequency panel in the sidebar.

theToyBox.showRegionsInOutline.description: Enable the Better Outline panel to show #region markers and nested symbols.

theToyBox.outline.highlightOnClick.description: Briefly highlight the line in the editor when clicking an item in the Better Outline panel.

theToyBox.autoRenameMatchingTags.description: Auto-rename matching HTML/XML tags when either the opening or closing tag is edited.

theToyBox.performance.maxLinesForTagRena.description: Maximum file length (in lines) for auto-renaming to be active.

theToyBox.autoRenameTag.activationOnLang.description: List of language IDs where auto tag renaming should be active.

theToyBox.autoRenameTag.voidElements.description: List of tags that are self-closing and should not be renamed.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
